summary: Route and review the M7 visual, UX, and localization handoff
acceptance_criteria: Record the product-owner decision M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001 as a current M7 Beta quality-track directive without reverting M5, M6, or earlier M7 progress.

Route Prompt B or an equivalent compact request to the designated art or visual-design thread 019f05b0-7e7e-71e3-b18f-e41c938a38db using real send_input when supported; if unsupported, record ART_THREAD_MANUAL_ROUTE_REQUIRED without fabricating delivery.

The visual/design thread returns a structured M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 Markdown handoff that maps concept-art intent to current systems, identifies 1.0 versus post-1.0 decisions, and preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.
The handoff distinguishes implemented capability, prototype UI, designed-but-unsurfaced capability, target expression only, rejected 1.0 content, and post-1.0 candidates.
Systems architecture and independent QA review the handoff before it can drive UI, localization, design-token, asset-slot, or app-shell implementation tasks.

No product code, sim rule, UI behavior, content-source fact, release artifact, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, cloud-save implementation, or manual node battle work is performed by this coordination task.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001

lead_orchestrator.next_action: Await the designated art thread's structured M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 Markdown handoff, then route it to systems_architect and qa_reviewer before UI implementation.

visual_design_reviewer.next_action: Produce structured M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 Markdown and route to lead_orchestrator.

notes: The source product-owner document has been moved from docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md to project/messages/inbox/M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001__product-owner.md because it is an inbound routing directive, not a stable design specification.
The inbound document may contain stale progress descriptions; current Git, taskctl, PROJECT_STATUS, and goal-mode-state remain authoritative.
M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 is already CLOSED, so this task begins from the current M7 Beta state rather than re-running content-lock work.
The UI/localization/visual direction track is part of M7 Beta quality work, not a new milestone and not an M5U rollback.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and outside the 1.0 mainline unless a later Human Gate reverses it.

Stop and route to the named reviewer or Human Gate if the art handoff requests frozen product changes, new major systems, manual node battle reversal, server/multiplayer, telemetry, paid services, secrets, or unresolved major cultural-risk decisions.
human_gates: manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required
commercial, release, store, branding, logo, or trademark decisions
telemetry, analytics, remote collection, accounts, paid services, or secrets
arbitrary-code mods, runtime scripting extensions, or Workshop support
cloud-save implementation, network persistence, or any account-backed save service
frozen product, platform, core architecture, technology stack, simulation authority, deterministic, or historical-policy changes
manual node battle reversal or any formal 1.0 scope reversal

product_owner_directive.decision: Add a M7 UI / Localization / Visual Direction quality track and obtain a structured art/UX handoff before UI beautification implementation.
product_owner_directive.progress_statement_policy: Treat progress descriptions in the inbound document as possibly stale; use repository facts as authoritative.
